transcript: I just... can't believe that Brian cheated on me. When someone betrays you, a nefarious entity known as a Tsarnoth is formed in your heart. And in order to get rid of this dark force, you must come face to face with it. And how do I do that? Here. I brewed something special for you. What is it? A mix of Siberian guava and tears from a fallen angel. When you take this liquid, the veil between reality and the underworld will be blurred. When you encounter the Xarnoth, you will have to cast it away by speaking firmly, but never use violence against it. Brian? Is that you? What's up, babe? What's going on? Do you want to go get ice cream? I have so much to tell you. Wow, you're looking hot. Shut up! Now what the heck did I do? Why did you cheat on me with that stupid girl from your cardio class? Uh, she was fine. Plus, I'm kind of top dog now, so you gotta hold me back. I cannot be stopped. Did you even consider how I would feel? Kimberly. I love Yale. You're like my second favorite girl. Screw you! Thank you for watching.
